name: Mushroom Sauce (Usda)
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the butter in a saucepan over medium heat.
2. Add the sliced mushrooms to the melted butter and cook until they are lightly browned on all sides.
3. Stir in the flour and salt, mixing well to combine.
4. Gradually add the milk while stirring continuously to prevent lumps from forming.
5. Cook the mixture over medium-low heat, stirring constantly, until it thickens to a desired consistency.
